cnbc.title: U.S. revokes Iran oil sales authorization after tanker attacks
cnbc.summary: Treasury had waived sanctions on Iranian oil through Aug. 21 after Washington and Tehran inked an interim deal to reopen Hormuz last month.

cnbc.title: U.S. resumes 'powerful strikes' on Iran after Hormuz Strait ship attacks, CENTCOM says
cnbc.summary: The U.S. revoked Iran oil sales authorization earlier in the day.

cnbc.title: Maine Senate race replacements circle amid pressure on Platner to drop out
cnbc.summary: Democrat Graham Platner has denied allegations of sexual assault leveled by Maine resident Jenny Racicot as calls for him to exit the pivotal race mount.

cnbc.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights; package could reach $2 billion
cnbc.summary: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.

cnbc.title: Trump renews Greenland threats at NATO summit, says U.S. could remove troops from Europe
cnbc.summary: NATO fell into a crisis earlier this year as Trump demanded that the U.S. must take control of Greenland on national security grounds.

cnbc.title: Kalshi traders see slim odds U.S. government will take a stake in OpenAI this year
cnbc.summary: Traders on the prediction markets platform see a less than 30% likelihood the federal government will take a stake in AI companies Anthropic and OpenAI.

cnbc.title: Meta enters AI image model race in bid to court advertisers and subscribers
cnbc.summary: Meta has announced Muse Image, its first AI model for image creation, as it seeks to attract creators and advertisers to its offerings.

cnbc.title: Mitch McConnell's health concerns grow amid 4th week in hospital with few details from aides
cnbc.summary: McConnell, the former longtime Senate leader who declined to seek an eighth term following a series of health scares, was admitted to the hospital on June 14.

cnbc.title: DeSantis-backed 'Stop WOKE' law meets appeals court block, teeing up possible Supreme Court fight
cnbc.summary: A Trump-appointed judge ruled against Gov. Ron DeSantis' "Stop WOKE Act," leaving Florida’s college speech limits blocked as a Supreme Court appeal looms.

cnbc.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas
cnbc.summary: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.
